message:
feat(plan): Add observational equivalence verification tests

Implement comprehensive property-based tests for verifying that Plan DAG
rewrites preserve observational equivalence under the runtime semantics:

src/plan/mod.rs:
- Add ProgramKind enum for distinguishing original vs rewritten programs
- Implement YieldOnce future for deterministic async scheduling control
- Add yield_n() helper for controlled task interleaving
- Create leaf_task() that respects cancellation checkpoints
- Implement join_branch() and race_branch() combinators for test programs
- Add result_to_label() helper for extracting successful outcomes

tests/phase0_verification.rs:
- Expand verification test suite with new property tests
- Add tests for race/join commutativity under various scheduling orders
- Test cancellation propagation through combinator trees
- Verify budget exhaustion behavior in rewritten programs matches original
- Add stress tests for concurrent execution with many interleaving points

These tests validate that the algebraic rewrites in the plan module
(based on semiring laws and observational equivalence) do not change
the observable behavior of programs under any valid scheduling order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
